snippet.title: ONE PIECE: Season 2 | Final Trailer | Netflix
snippet.description:
See you on March 10th!

MORE INFO ON ONE PIECE: INTO THE GRAND LINE:
Netflix’s epic high-seas pirate adventure, ONE PIECE, returns for Season 2—unleashing fiercer adversaries and the most perilous quests yet. Luffy and the Straw Hats set sail for the extraordinary Grand Line—a legendary stretch of sea where danger and wonder await at every turn. As they journey through this unpredictable realm in search of the world’s greatest treasure, they’ll encounter bizarre islands and a host of formidable new enemies.

ABOUT ONE PIECE:
Netflix’s live-action adaptation of ONE PIECE is based on Japan’s highest-selling manga series of all time by Eiichiro Oda, with over 100 volumes and 500M copies sold worldwide. The epic high-seas adventure follows Monkey D. Luffy on his quest to find the legendary fabled treasure, the ONE PIECE, and become King of the Pirates. The beloved franchise has a vast, multigenerational global fan base. Upon its debut in 2023, the Netflix live-action series became a global phenomenon, spending eight weeks on the Global Top 10, reaching #1 in over 75 countries and making history as the first Netflix English-language series to debut at #1 in Japan. The show has nearly 100M views and is one of Netflix’s most downloaded shows of all time. ONE PIECE was nominated for 11 awards at the Children’s & Family Emmy Awards, including Outstanding Young Teen Series. The beloved adaptation offers fans ways to engage year-round, off-screen with a brand new immersive experience set to open at Netflix House and fans can bring the world of the live-action show into their everyday lives with products like LEGO, Moose Toys and more at Netflix Shop and retailers worldwide. ONE PIECE returns for its highly anticipated second season in 2026, and has been renewed for Season 3. The show is created in partnership with Shueisha and is produced by Tomorrow Studios (an ITV Studios partner) and Netflix.

Watch on Netflix: https://www.netflix.com/title/81218765

About Netflix:
Netflix is one of the world’s leading entertainment services offering TV series, films, games and live programming across a wide variety of genres and languages. Members can play, pause and resume watching as much as they want, anytime, anywhere, and can change their plans at any time. 

ONE PIECE: Season 2 | Final Trailer | Netflix
https://www.youtube.com/@Netflix

Luffy and the Straw Hat Pirates set sail for the legendary Grand Line, encountering wondrous new lands and fresh dangers in their quest for treasure.

snippet.title: Scary Movie | Official Trailer (2026 Movie) - Marlon Wayans, Shawn Wayans, Anna Faris, Regina Hall
snippet.description:
We’re baaaaaack. Watch the official trailer for the new #ScaryMovie - only in theatres June 12. 

Twenty-six years after outrunning a suspiciously familiar masked killer (“Ghostface”), the Core Four are back in the killer’s crosshairs and no horror movie IP is safe. Marlon Wayans (“Shorty”), Shawn Wayans (“Ray”), Anna Faris (“Cindy”), and Regina Hall (“Brenda”) reunite in Scary Movie alongside returning favorites and fresh faces to slash through reboots, remakes, requels, prequels, sequels, spin-offs, elevated horror, origin stories, anything with the word legacy in it, and every “final chapter” that absolutely isn’t final. Nothing is sacred. No trope survives. ​Every line gets crossed. The Wayans are back to cancel the Cancel Culture.

snippet.title: Céline Dion - I Love You (Lyrics)
snippet.description:
Céline Dion - I Love You (Lyrics)
Get:

Lyrics:

I must be crazy now
Maybe I dream too much
But when I think of you
I long to feel your touch

To whisper in your ear
Words that are old as time
Words only you would hear
If only you were mine

I wish I could go back to the very first day I saw you
Should've made my move when you looked in my eyes
‘Cause by now I know that you'd feel the way that I do
And I'd whisper these words as you'd lie here by my side

I love you, please say
You love me too, these three words
They could change our lives forever
And I promise you that we will always be together
Till the end of time

So today, I finally find the courage deep inside
Just to walk right up to your door
But my body can't move when I finally get to it
Just like a thousand times before

Then without a word he handed me this letter
Read I hope this finds the way into your heart, it said

I love you, please say
You love me too, these three words
They could change our lives forever
And I promise you that we will always be together
Till the end of time

Well maybe I, I need a little love yeah
And maybe I, I need a little care
And maybe I, maybe you, maybe you, maybe you
Oh you need somebody just to hold you
If you do, just reach out and I'll be there

I love you, please say
You love me too
Please say you love me too
Till the end of time
These three words
They could change our lives forever
And I promise you that we will always be together

Oh, I love you
Please say you love me too
Please Please
Say you love me too
Till the end of time
My baby
Together, together, forever
Till the end of time
I love you
I will be your light
Shining bright
Shining through your eyes
My baby

👉 Lagu Lawas || Indonesia Tahun 80an Merupakan Kumpulan Lagu Lawas Tahun 1980an Asal Indonesia. Lagu-lagu Ini Bukan Sekadar Musik Tetapi Juga Karya Seni Yang Membawa Pendengarnya Kembali Ke Momen-momen Indah Dan Berkesan Di Masa Lalu. Pada Masa Itulah Musik Indonesia Mengalami Perkembangan Yang Pesat Dengan Berbagai Genre Dan Gaya, Mulai Dari Pop, Rock, Hingga Dangdut Dan Balada.
👉 Pengantar Lagu Lawas || Indonesia Tahun 80an:Lagu Ini Merupakan Salah Satu Lagu Balada Yang Sangat Terkenal Dengan Kandungan Yang Mendalam Tentang Cinta Dan Kesakitan.
Nike Ardilla Menjadi Ikon Pop Indonesia Dengan Lagu Ini. Melodi Yang Lembut Dan Lirik Yang Emosional Telah Menyentuh Hati Banyak Orang.
👉 Lirik Yang Penuh Makna: Lirik Sering Kali Menceritakan Tentang Cinta, Kehidupan, Dan Pengalaman Pribadi, Dengan Mudah Menyentuh Hati Pendengarnya.

👉Kenangan Indah: Lagu-lagu Ini Mengingatkan Kembali Kenangan Indah Dan Momen Tak Terlupakan Pendengarnya Di Masa Mudanya.
Pengaruh Artis: 

👉 Banyak Lagu-lagu Yang Dibawakan Oleh Artis-artis Legendaris Yang Mempunyai Pengaruh Besar Dalam Musik Indonesia 
Dan Meninggalkan Bekas Yang Mendalam Di Hati Para Penggemarnya.

👉 Jika Kamu Pecinta Musik Dan Ingin Mengenang Kembali Momen Indah Tahun 80-an, Lagu Lawas || Indonesia Tahun 80an Pasti Akan Menghadirkan Momen Kenikmatan Musik Yang Menyenangkan Dan Penuh Nostalgia. Dengarkan Dan Biarkan Musik Membawa Anda Kembali Ke Kenangan Indah Masa Lalu.

snippet.title: WOW!! Bisa Jadi PROTOTYPE Poppy Playtime 5 & Keren Banget 🥶💀🥶 | Poppy Playtime 5 Survival Indonesia
snippet.description:
WOW!! Bisa Jadi PROTOTYPE Poppy Playtime 5 & Keren Banget 🥶💀🥶 | Poppy Playtime 5 Survival Indonesia

Nama Game : Poppy Playtime 5 Survival
Link Game : https://www.roblox.com/games/84099869526517

🔰 Sekarang kalau mau record, bang Hayo kabarin lewat VOICE di Room Santuy yang ada di Discord. Jadwal ga tentu, tapi biasanya kalau sore sekitar jam 15.30 - 16.30 WIB. Baca lagi bagian bawah biar kalian benar-benar mengerti 🗿

Sebelum JOIN, tolong baca ini ya 🙏😁
✅ Izin sama orang tua & tanya boleh ga install dan main Discord? Btw, discord punya aturan kalau mau buat akun mesti umur 13+
✅ PENTING!! Ikut MABAR atau RECORD mungkin agak susah karena ramai yang tungguin bang Hayo, sedangkan game Roblox server-nya terbatas
✅ Record juga GA SELALU MABAR  karena beberapa game ga boleh rusuh & mesti diatur sebaik mungkin
✅ Kalau mau record, bang Hayo kabarin lewat voice "Room Santuy" di discord
✅ Ga bisa ADD karena sudah full. Satu-satunya solusi adalah FOLLOW akun Roblox bang Hayo dan nanti kalian bisa JOIN bang Hayo main. Lalu, kalau bang Hayo lagi AFK atau SERVER sudah penuh, teman-teman ga bisa join ya
✅ Kadang bang Hayo harus pakai LINK PRIVATE SERVER biar record-nya lebih lancar. Kirim link-nya di Discord & untuk cara JOIN baca di cara-ikut-record yang ada di Discord
✅ Baca PERATURAN GROUP & PERTANYAAN UMUM  di Discord untuk kepentingan bersama
✅ Di group ini kalian juga bisa mencari KAWAN yang mungkin cocok sama kalian dan bisa main bareng. Ga perlu fokus sama bang Hayo saja karena bang Hayo ga mampu standby 24 jam
✅ Mohon pengertiannya kalau ga berhasil JOIN bang Hayo karena server sudah FULL & sistemnya siapa cepat dia masuk dulu

🔰 Bang, kenapa ga bisa chat di Discord?
Untuk menjadi MEMBER di Discord, teman-teman harus tulis username Roblox yang AKTIF di nama-roblox & baca bagian peraturan-server

Bang Hayo sudah jelasin secara lengkap di Discord. Cari saja di channel cara-ikut-record biar kalian paham. Lalu, akun yang umurnya kurang dari 13 tahun akan agak sulit buat join karena peraturan terbaru Roblox

snippet.title: Pengakuanku - Haddad Alwi feat. Danilla (Official Music Video)
snippet.description:
Terkadang (atau mungkin sering), kita melihat orang lain hanya dari tampilan luarnya saja. Kita menjalani hari seakan-akan hidup memang harus berjalan apa adanya, bukan sebagai anugerah yang patut disyukuri kehadirannya.

Jika hidup adalah sebuah perjalanan, apakah kita sudi bertegur sapa dan mendengar sesama, baik yang dekat ataupun yang sekadar lewat? Menghadiahkan peluk pada pohon yang tetap berdiri menahan banjir, yang kerap menjadi sumber macet saat kamu pulang kerja? Atau mengelus lembut seekor kucing kedinginan yang kehilangan induknya di tengah riuh jalanan?
